operator_rules.combine_safe_steps: 2-5 safe sequential steps when logically safe
operator_rules.repeated_error_rule: STOP_SAFE → inspect → official docs/web if needed → then next CMD
operator_rules.environment_rule: Always state SERVER VM BASH / WINDOWS CMD / GITHUB / TELEGRAM. Never mix environments in one command block.
operator_rules.server_rule: Do not create transition archives on server when operator asks GitHub archive. Server runtime is production/runtime, not archive scratchpad.
operator_rules.github_rule: Use GitHub archive path storage/memory/archive for continuity records. Do not push from server until write auth fixed.
operator_rules.delete_rule: No delete without explicit cleanup gate, candidate list, protected-path check, archive, audit, and operator approval.
operator_rules.live_rule: No live eBay publish/revise/delete without explicit live gate and token/payload/readonly verification.
